TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ruisui (瑞穗鄉, Hamicho go) mki sku Hualien. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 151.59 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 57.39 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 7.4 km²), 9,520 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 3,717 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 4,438 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 47%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis, Sakizaya ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. sinpngan sehu s'uli sku sahuy go. ays ptyaw sebu Ruisui ays psgayun 11 ru 16 alang. 16 alang hani ga, Langas , Lacihakan , Morocan , Atolan , Koyo , Ukang , Narowan , Kalala , Sapat , Maifor , Olalip , Fanaw , Olaw , Marorok , Cirocan , Kiwit .
S.PHON: ruis~ɕui (***, ħamiʦ~ʨħo ɣo) mki s~ɕku ħualien. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa *.* km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na amis~ɕ, s~ɕakizaja ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. s~ɕinpŋan s~ɕeħu s~ɕʔuli s~ɕku s~ɕaħuj ɣo. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu ruis~ɕui ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun ** ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, laŋas~ɕ , laʦ~ʨiħakan , moroʦ~ʨan , atolan , kojo , ukaŋ , narowan , kalala , s~ɕapat , mai*or , olalip , *anaw , olaw , marorok , ʦ~ʨiroʦ~ʨan , kiwit .
S.FORM: Ruisui (瑞穗鄉, Hamicho go) mki sku Hualien. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 151.59 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 57.39 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 7.4 km²), 9,520 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 3,717 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 4,438 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 47%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis, Sakizaya ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. sinpngan sehu s'uli sku sahuy go. ays ptyaw sebu Ruisui ays psgayun 11 ru 16 alang. 16 alang hani ga, Langas , Lacihakan , Morocan , Atolan , Koyo , Ukang , Narowan , Kalala , Sapat , Maifor , Olalip , Fanaw , Olaw , Marorok , Cirocan , Kiwit .
S.PHON: ruis~ɕui (***, ħamiʦ~ʨħo ɣo) mki s~ɕku ħualien. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa *.* km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na amis~ɕ, s~ɕakizaja ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. s~ɕinpŋan s~ɕeħu s~ɕʔuli s~ɕku s~ɕaħuj ɣo. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu ruis~ɕui ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun ** ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, laŋas~ɕ , laʦ~ʨiħakan , moroʦ~ʨan , atolan , kojo , ukaŋ , narowan , kalala , s~ɕapat , mai*or , olalip , *anaw , olaw , marorok , ʦ~ʨiroʦ~ʨan , kiwit .
